normalized_title: City of Joondalup Local Planning Policy - Non-Residential Development in Residential Areas
instrument_no: LPP - Non-Residential Development in Residential Areas
scope_summary: City of Joondalup local planning policy for non-residential development in residential areas. It sets out the City's approach to considering home-based and other small-scale non-residential uses in residential zones, addressing scale, amenity, traffic, parking, signage and adjoining-residents impacts. Made under Schedule 2, Part 2 of the deemed provisions of the Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015.

key_numeric_standards.topic: a. Container deposit scheme infrastructure must not be erect

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015

quality_flags: mechanical (build_missing_analyses) pass; subject to a deeper re-analysis pass
